raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 1,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "No structural feedback or suggestions for reorganization were provided.",
    "R1.6": "The agent provided a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, improving the clarity and readability of the text.",
    "RX.1": "The output presented all claims as equally confident, without flagging uncertainty or providing evidence for the recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly adhered to the requested scope, focusing on sentence-level polish and minimal rewrites.",
    "RX.4": "The output was harm-free and did not introduce new errors or fabrications, but rather improved the original text.",
    "RX.5": "No annotations or sources were provided for the changes made, making it difficult to trace the provenance of the edits."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: No structural feedback or suggestions for reorganization were provided.
rationale.R1.6: The agent provided a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, improving the clarity and readability of the text.
rationale.RX.1: The output presented all claims as equally confident, without flagging uncertainty or providing evidence for the recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adhered to the requested scope, focusing on sentence-level polish and minimal rewrites.
rationale.RX.4: The output was harm-free and did not introduce new errors or fabrications, but rather improved the original text.
rationale.RX.5: No annotations or sources were provided for the changes made, making it difficult to trace the provenance of the edits.
